title: Funwhole Antique-Store Lighting Building-Bricks Set - City Town Life Corner Shop LED Light Construction Building Model Set 2847 Pcs for Adults and Teen
features: 【Back to European Town Life】The antique store draws inspiration from the charm of authentic street scenes in our towns. The exquisite exterior design of this set and the stained glass windows paired with lighting displayed on the third floor, create a strong sense of community atmosphere in a European-style town.

【Exquisite Details】This set features rich interior details. The first floor is the store lobby for collectibles, the second floor is the clavichord and ancient clock collection area, and the third floor is dedicated to a clock-themed display. Plus a large bookcase spans three levels. Each floor features a quick-release design, including four minifigures and a kitten.

【Exclusive Lighting Design(battery not included)】This building includes 6 light strings with a total of 13 lighting positions. We've adopted FUNWHOLE's newly upgraded original lighting accessories and developed new accessories that make wire concealment easier, bringing you a smoother build experience.

【Modular Cities】This town life set is a standard-sized corner design that can be blended seamlessly with other modular buildings. Plus, we have introduced the new TypeC interface, which can supply power to multiple building sets in series.

【Quality Guarantee】The building bricks and lighting accessories have undergone strict quality inspections to ensure that every brick fits snugly together. We also offer a free 2-year warranty for added peace of mind. For any issues (missing pieces, quality concerns), contact our customer service team via email (provided on the package) for prompt assistance.
